name: cncf-talks
description: CNCF presentation decks built with Marp

scripts.build: npm run build:talks && cp landing/index.html dist/index.html
scripts.build:kccn-eu-2026: mkdir -p dist/kccn-eu-2026 && marp KCCN-EU-Maintainer-Summit-2026/presentation/slides.md --html --theme KCCN-EU-Maintainer-Summit-2026/presentation/theme/cncf.css -o dist/kccn-eu-2026/index.html && cp -r KCCN-EU-Maintainer-Summit-2026/presentation/images dist/kccn-eu-2026/images

author: Nate Waddington
